title: Review repository and suggest next MVP
user_input: Review the repository and suggest the next MVP.

configuration_effort.notes: Works with defaults; improves with software-engineering domain pack.

concept_questions: should next-MVP recommendation be artifact or plain answer
should memory be consulted by default

title: Refactor legacy module with safety gates
user_input: Refactor the auth module. It's outdated and has tech debt.

gates.rationale: File modifications can alter project state. Approval required.
Code changes below coverage threshold need explicit override.

configuration_effort.notes: Requires wolf.yaml with legacy pack and test gate rules.

concept_questions: should refactoring require explicit domain pack or be default behavior
how to handle rollback on failure

title: Create PR via GitHub MCP with policy check
user_input: Create a PR for the feature branch and run checks.
expected_visible_behavior: request approval for GitHub MCP calls

external.name: github.mcp
external.fallback_action: draft PR description locally without CI polling

gates.rationale: External actions may affect third-party systems. Approval required.
MCP invocation may trigger side effects. Approval required.

configuration_effort.notes: Requires GitHub MCP setup and external action policy.

concept_questions: should MCP tools be pre-approved per repository
how to handle MCP failure gracefully

title: Explain what a monorepo is
user_input: What is a monorepo and when should I use one?

configuration_effort.notes: No config needed.

concept_questions: should simple answers be cached

title: Quick NDA risk review
user_input: Review this NDA quickly. Highlight risks.

gates.rationale: This is not legal advice. Please consult a licensed attorney.

configuration_effort.notes: Works with defaults; improves with legal-ops domain pack.

concept_questions: should legal review require explicit disclaimer gate
how to handle jurisdiction-specific rules

title: Support enterprise contract negotiation
user_input: Help me negotiate the SaaS contract. Vendor pushed back on liability cap.

external.name: external_legal_db.api
external.fallback_action: use internal precedent memory without external query

gates.rationale: Legal advice requires expert review before delivery.
External database queries may incur costs. Approval required.

configuration_effort.notes: Requires legal-ops pack with compliance framework and external DB access.

concept_questions: should legal expert gate be human or simulated
how to validate external legal DB freshness

title: GDPR privacy impact assessment
user_input: Run a GDPR privacy impact assessment on our new feature.

gates.rationale: PII handling requires explicit confirmation for compliance.

configuration_effort.notes: Requires legal-ops pack with GDPR framework.

concept_questions: should PII detection be automatic or manual
how to handle cross-border data rules

title: Draft follow-up email after meeting
user_input: Draft a follow-up email to the team after our standup.

configuration_effort.notes: No config needed.

concept_questions: should email draft pull from calendar context automatically

title: Prepare board meeting materials
user_input: Prepare the board meeting pack for next week. Include financials, roadmap, and risks.

configuration_effort.notes: Works with defaults; improves with office-assistant domain pack.

concept_questions: should meeting prep auto-pull from calendar and email
how to handle sensitive board data access

title: Resolve calendar conflict with approval
user_input: Reschedule my 3pm meeting. It conflicts with a client call.

gates.rationale: Calendar changes affect scheduling. Approval required.
External notifications may be irreversible. Approval required.

configuration_effort.notes: Requires calendar MCP and external action policy.

concept_questions: should calendar changes require explicit approval every time
how to handle recurring meeting conflicts

title: Systematic literature scan on AI safety
user_input: Do a systematic scan of recent papers on AI safety. Summarize findings.

external.name: arxiv.api

external.fallback_action: use cached search results without live query

configuration_effort.notes: Works with defaults; improves with research domain pack and API keys.

concept_questions: should research tasks auto-search or use curated sources
how to handle paywalled content

title: Design A/B test experiment
user_input: Design an A/B test to measure the new onboarding flow impact.

gates.rationale: Experiment plan affects user experience. Approval required.

configuration_effort.notes: Requires research domain pack with statistical framework.

how to validate sample size calculations

title: Identify SOC2 compliance gaps
user_input: Run a SOC2 gap analysis on our current infrastructure setup.
expected_visible_behavior: return gap analysis with remediation plan

gates.rationale: Secrets detected in inputs. Review required before processing.

title: Execute incident response runbook
user_input: We have a potential data leak. Execute the incident response runbook.

external.fallback_action: log notification to CaseTrace without sending

gates.rationale: Emergency actions may have irreversible effects. Approval required.
External notifications may be irreversible. Approval required.
